## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between FOSSA and GrowthX to discuss progress on CVE page development and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [CVE page mockup approved; minor tweaks needed (remove MIT license, clarify metrics)](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [375 CVE pages to be created; GrowthX to select CVEs from this year](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [GitHub access for GrowthX engineer pending; Andy to add today](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [CMS implementation for FOSSA still in progress, facing some challenges](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)

## Topics

### CVE Page Development

  - [Mockup mirrors registry design, approved by Andy](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Adjustments needed:](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
      - [Remove MIT license mention (not relevant for CVEs)](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [Clarify or remove "9 100% fixed" and "95%" metrics](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Consider CVE impact on multiple package versions](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of CVEs from 2025 for page creation](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [375 CVE pages to be generated and pushed live](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Project Timeline and Deliverables

  - [Contract goal: 1,500 pages over 12 months (375 pages/quarter)](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Current focus: Delivering backlog of 375 CVE pages](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [Project end date: June 13, 2025](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=265.0)
  - [20 CWE articles completed; 8 remaining CWE articles likely won't be completed](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### GitHub Access

  - [Andy apologized for delay in adding GrowthX engineer to FOSSA's GitHub](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
  - [Aida provided engineer's email in chat](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=40.0)
  - [Andy to add access today, enabling further development](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

### CMS Implementation

  - [Andy confirmed progress on CMS implementation](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Facing some internal challenges ("uphill battle")](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Recognized benefits of CMS for content publishing efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andy to add GrowthX engineer to FOSSA's GitHub repository](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
  - [GrowthX to compile list of 2025 CVEs for page creation](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [GrowthX to make adjustments to CVE page mockup (remove MIT license, clarify metrics)](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Continue CVE page generation and publication process](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [Andy to continue pushing for CMS implementation internally](https://fathom.video/share/xnpzBA9s-RYSxs4wgrXVGaHCrsarwSUw?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
